name: Misprint
description: Two riso plates sliding in and out of register — mirrored offsets pull the inks apart and let them overlap into new blends.

code.style: --plate1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color3)); --plate2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* the two plates share one emitted offset, mirrored, so they slide apart symmetrically */ --mx: @r(-10, 10); --my: @r(-10, 10); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 58%; left: calc(21% + @var(--mx) * 1%); top: calc(21% + @var(--my) * 1%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--plate1); opacity: 0.72; mix-blend-mode: multiply; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 58%; left: calc(21% - @var(--mx) * 1%); top: calc(21% - @var(--my) * 1%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--plate2); opacity: 0.72; mix-blend-mode: multiply; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
